languages.text: "Значит, я уже поручала это дело вам? Каковы успехи?"{n}Лария тянется к закрепленному на поясе {g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}инфопланшету{/g}, готовясь зафиксировать ваш отчет.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Значит, я уже поручала это дело вам? Каковы успехи?"{n}Лария тянется к закреплённому на поясе {g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}инфопланшету{/g}, готовясь зафиксировать ваш отчет.{/n}

languages.text: "That means I must have tasked you with this matter already, yes? Any progress?"{n}Laria reaches for the {g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}data-slate{/g} attached to her belt, preparing to log your report.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Значит, я уже поручала это дело вам? Каковы успехи?"{n}Лария тянется к закрепленному на поясе {g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}инфопланшету{/g}, готовясь зафиксировать ваш отчет.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "That means I must have tasked you with this matter already, yes? Any progress?"{n}Laria reaches for the {g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}data-slate{/g} attached to her belt, preparing to log your report.{/n}

"That means I must have tasked you with this matter already, yes? Any progress?"{n}Laria reaches for the {g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}data-slate{/g} attached to her belt, preparing to log your report.{/n}

"That means I must have tasked you with this matter already, yes? Any progress?"{n}Laria reaches for the {g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}data-slate{/g} attached to her belt, preparing to log your report.{/n}

languages.text: “这么说，我已经派你去查这件事了，对吧？有什么进展？”{n}菈丽雅伸手去拿挂在腰间的{g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}数据板{/g}，准备记录你的汇报。{/n}
languages.original_text: "That means I must have tasked you with this matter already, yes? Any progress?"{n}Laria reaches for the {g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}data-slate{/g} attached to her belt, preparing to log your report.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “这么说，我已经派你去查这件事了，对吧？有什么进展？”{n}菈丽雅伸手去拿挂在腰间的{g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}数据板{/g}，准备记录你的汇报。{/n}

languages.text: « Puisque vous le dites, c'est sûrement que je vous ai d'ores et déjà confié cette tâche, non ? Eh bien, où en êtes-vous ? » {n}Laria se saisit de la {g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}plaque de données{/g} accrochée à sa ceinture, fin prête à consigner votre rapport.{/n}
languages.original_text: "That means I must have tasked you with this matter already, yes? Any progress?"{n}Laria reaches for the {g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}data-slate{/g} attached to her belt, preparing to log your report.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Puisque vous le dites, c'est sûrement que je vous ai d'ores et déjà confié cette tâche, non ? Eh bien, où en êtes-vous ? » {n}Laria se saisit de la {g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}plaque de données{/g} accrochée à sa ceinture, fin prête à consigner votre rapport.{/n}

languages.text: "Demek ki bu görevi sana çoktan vermişim, öyle mi? Herhangi bir ilerleme kaydedildi mi?" {n}Laria, kemerindeki {g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}databelaya{/g} uzanarak raporunu kaydetmeye hazırlanıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "That means I must have tasked you with this matter already, yes? Any progress?"{n}Laria reaches for the {g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}data-slate{/g} attached to her belt, preparing to log your report.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Demek ki bu görevi sana çoktan vermişim, öyle mi? Herhangi bir ilerleme kaydedildi mi?" {n}Laria, kemerindeki {g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}databelaya{/g} uzanarak raporunu kaydetmeye hazırlanıyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Eso significa que ya le habré encargado este asunto, ¿no? ¿Algún progreso?». {n}Laria lleva la mano a la {g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}tablilla de datos{/g} de su cinturón, preparándose para registrar tu informe.{/n}
languages.original_text: "That means I must have tasked you with this matter already, yes? Any progress?"{n}Laria reaches for the {g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}data-slate{/g} attached to her belt, preparing to log your report.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Eso significa que ya le habré encargado este asunto, ¿no? ¿Algún progreso?». {n}Laria lleva la mano a la {g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}tablilla de datos{/g} de su cinturón, preparándose para registrar tu informe.{/n}

languages.text: "Das heißt, ich habe Euch bereits mit dieser Angelegenheit betraut, ja? Irgendwelche Fortschritte?"{n}Laria greift nach dem {g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}Datablock{/g} an ihrem Gürtel, um deinen Bericht zu protokollieren.{/n}
languages.original_text: "That means I must have tasked you with this matter already, yes? Any progress?"{n}Laria reaches for the {g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}data-slate{/g} attached to her belt, preparing to log your report.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Das heißt, ich habe Euch bereits mit dieser Angelegenheit betraut, ja? Irgendwelche Fortschritte?"{n}Laria greift nach dem {g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}Datablock{/g} an ihrem Gürtel, um deinen Bericht zu protokollieren.{/n}

languages.text: 「ということは、私がこの件をあなたに任せたことがあるということですね。進捗は？」{n}ラリアは腰につけた{g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}データスレート{/g}を取り出し、あなたの報告を記録する準備をしている。{/n}
languages.original_text: "That means I must have tasked you with this matter already, yes? Any progress?"{n}Laria reaches for the {g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}data-slate{/g} attached to her belt, preparing to log your report.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「ということは、私がこの件をあなたに任せたことがあるということですね。進捗は？」{n}ラリアは腰につけた{g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}データスレート{/g}を取り出し、あなたの報告を記録する準備をしている。{/n}
